message:
bd-ehk.4: FrankenLab deterministic testing harness integration

Connect LabScenario (seed-controlled scheduling, JSONL logging, tracing
spans) with ProgramSimulator (headless model execution) via Lab::run_scenario.

New module: ftui-harness/src/lab_integration.rs
- Lab::run_scenario(config, model, closure) → LabScenarioRun<LabOutput>
- Lab::assert_deterministic_with() for replay verification
- LabSession wraps ProgramSimulator with deterministic time injection
- Frame checksum recording via FNV-1a for byte-identical replay
- Event ordering tracking with time-monotonicity anomaly detection
- JSONL structured logging for frames, events, and warnings
- 19 tests including 100-seed determinism proof

Re-exports Lab, LabConfig, LabOutput, LabSession from ftui-harness lib.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
